data.title: Analyst: SOL's current key resistance level is $144, and the key support level is $129
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto analyst Ali Martinez posted on the X platform that the current key support level of SOL is $129 and the key resistance level is $144. Prices beyond this range may set the tone for the next trend of SOL.

data.title: Crypto, DeFi may widen wealth gap, destabilize finance: BIS report
data.description:
The growing adoption of cryptocurrencies may pose risks to the traditional financial system and exacerbate wealth inequality, according to the Bank for International Settlements (BIS). In an April 15 report, the BIS warned that the number of investors and amount of capital in crypto and decentralized finance (DeFi) have “reached a critical mass,” with investor protection becoming a “significant concern for regulators. ”The size of the crypto market signals that authorities should be worried about the “stability of crypto over and above the role it may have for TradFi and the real economy,” the report states, highlighting the role of stablecoins, which the BIS said have “become the means through which participants transfer value within crypto. ”BIS report on crypto and DeFi’s functions and financial stability implications
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-adoption-critical-mass-regulation-wealth-gap-bis?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum News: Transaction Fees Visit 2020 Lows – Reason & Impact
data.description:
The latest Ethereum news reveals that the network’s transaction fees have been declining and recently pushed to levels last seen in 2020. This warranted a recap of how the Ethereum network performance and the findings were rather interesting.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/19/ethereum-news-transaction-fees-visit-2020-lows-reason-impact/

data.title: Solana Leads Blockchain Revenue Despite 90% Drop in Memecoin Activity
data.description:
Despite a major drop in memecoin activity, Solana still dominates blockchain revenue, contributing over 70% of all on-chain earnings.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/solana-leads-blockchain-revenue-despite-90-drop-in-memecoin-activity

data.title: Planet Evening News
The whale who spent $16.41 million to build a position in PNUT and other popular tokens lost nearly $10 million in 5 months
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, in five months, "the whale who spent $16.41 million to build positions in PNUT, ai16z, and arc" has accumulated a loss of $9.98 million, and its assets have shrunk by more than 60%.
According to previous analysis, the address may belong to Galaxy Digital, but it is not yet possible to confirm whether it is the market maker of the three tokens.
